description: Usually users find the slot containing this component by using the ProtoFlux node User Root Slot.

fields.RenderSettings: The user's render settings. Usually part of an avatar.
fields.ScreenController: The screen controller that the user is using to control the game.
fields.OverrideRoot: The slot currently overriding the user's root position locally for rendering.
fields.OverrideView: The slot currently overriding the user's view position locally for rendering.
fields.OverrideEars: The slot currently overriding the user's ears position locally for rendering audio.

usage: Usually users find the slot containing this component by using the ProtoFlux node User Root Slot.
